targets.rawSql:
WITH all_nodes AS (
  SELECT 
    $__timeInterval(ingest_timestamp) AS time_bucket, 
    public_key, 
    latitude, 
    longitude, 
    is_repeater, 
    is_room_server
  FROM meshcore_adverts
  WHERE ingest_timestamp >= ($__fromTime - INTERVAL 7 DAY) 
    AND ingest_timestamp <= $__toTime
),
filtered_time_buckets AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT time_bucket 
  FROM all_nodes
  WHERE time_bucket >= $__timeInterval($__fromTime)
    AND time_bucket <= $__timeInterval($__toTime)
  ORDER BY time_bucket ASC
),
rolling_window AS (
  SELECT 
    tb.time_bucket as time,
    n.public_key,
    n.latitude,
    n.longitude,
    n.is_repeater,
    n.is_room_server
  FROM filtered_time_buckets tb
  INNER JOIN all_nodes n ON n.time_bucket BETWEEN (tb.time_bucket - INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND tb.time_bucket
)
SELECT 
  time,
  count(DISTINCT public_key) AS cumulative_unique_nodes,
  count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL AND latitude != 0 AND longitude != 0 THEN public_key END) AS nodes_with_location,
  count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN latitude IS NULL OR longitude IS NULL OR latitude = 0 OR longitude = 0 THEN public_key END) AS nodes_without_location,
  count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_repeater = 1 THEN public_key END) AS repeaters,
  count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_room_server = 1 THEN public_key END) AS room_servers
FROM rolling_window
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT 
    $__timeInterval(ingest_timestamp) as time,
    SUM(length(packet) * 8) / (toUInt32($__timeInterval(ingest_timestamp)) / 1000) as throughput
FROM meshcore_packets 
WHERE $__timeFilter(ingest_timestamp)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT 
    $__timeInterval(ingest_timestamp) as time,
    multiIf(
        payload_type = 0, 'REQ',
        payload_type = 1, 'RESPONSE', 
        payload_type = 2, 'TXT_MSG',
        payload_type = 3, 'ACK',
        payload_type = 4, 'ADVERT',
        payload_type = 5, 'GRP_TXT',
        payload_type = 6, 'GRP_DATA',
        payload_type = 7, 'ANON_REQ',
        payload_type = 8, 'PATH',
        payload_type = 9, 'TRACE',
        payload_type = 15, 'RAW_CUSTOM',
        toString(payload_type)
    ) as payload_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT payload) as count
FROM meshcore_packets 
WHERE $__timeFilter(ingest_timestamp)
  AND hex(origin_pubkey) IN ($origin_pubkey)
GROUP BY time, payload_type
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT 
    $__timeInterval(ingest_timestamp) as time,
    multiIf(
        payload_type = 0, 'REQ',
        payload_type = 1, 'RESPONSE', 
        payload_type = 2, 'TXT_MSG',
        payload_type = 3, 'ACK',
        payload_type = 4, 'ADVERT',
        payload_type = 5, 'GRP_TXT',
        payload_type = 6, 'GRP_DATA',
        payload_type = 7, 'ANON_REQ',
        payload_type = 8, 'PATH',
        payload_type = 9, 'TRACE',
        payload_type = 15, 'RAW_CUSTOM',
        toString(payload_type)
    ) as payload_type,
    COUNT(payload_type) as count
FROM meshcore_packets 
WHERE $__timeFilter(ingest_timestamp)
  AND hex(origin_pubkey) IN ($origin_pubkey)
GROUP BY time, payload_type
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT 
    $__timeInterval(ingest_timestamp) as time,
    channel_hash,
    COUNT(DISTINCT message_id) as count
FROM meshcore_public_channel_messages 
WHERE $__timeFilter(ingest_timestamp)
  AND channel_hash != ''
GROUP BY time, channel_hash
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT 
    $__timeInterval(ingest_timestamp) as time,
    multiIf(
        route_type = 0, 'TRANSPORT_FLOOD',
        route_type = 1, 'FLOOD',
        route_type = 2, 'DIRECT', 
        route_type = 3, 'TRANSPORT_DIRECT',
        concat('UNKNOWN_', toString(route_type))
    ) as route_type_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT payload) as unique_payloads
FROM meshcore_packets 
WHERE $__timeFilter(ingest_timestamp)
GROUP BY time, route_type
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT 
    $__timeInterval(ingest_timestamp) as time,
    multiIf(
        route_type = 0, 'TRANSPORT_FLOOD',
        route_type = 1, 'FLOOD',
        route_type = 2, 'DIRECT', 
        route_type = 3, 'TRANSPORT_DIRECT',
        concat('UNKNOWN_', toString(route_type))
    ) as route_type_name,
    COUNT(*) as packet_count
FROM meshcore_packets 
WHERE $__timeFilter(ingest_timestamp)
GROUP BY time, route_type
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT 
    $__timeInterval(ingest_timestamp) as time,
    multiIf(
        route_type = 0, 'TRANSPORT_FLOOD',
        route_type = 1, 'FLOOD',
        route_type = 2, 'DIRECT', 
        route_type = 3, 'TRANSPORT_DIRECT',
        concat('UNKNOWN_', toString(route_type))
    ) as route_type_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT payload) as unique_payloads
FROM meshcore_packets 
WHERE $__timeFilter(ingest_timestamp)
GROUP BY time, route_type
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Percentages of all repeats by routing type - $payload_type

list.definition:
SELECT 
    concat(
        trim(origin), ' (', left(hex(origin_pubkey), 6), '...', right(hex(origin_pubkey), 6), ')',
        '|',
        hex(origin_pubkey)
    ) as combined
FROM meshcore_packets 
WHERE trim(origin) != '' AND trim(origin_pubkey) != ''
  AND $__timeFilter(ingest_timestamp)
GROUP BY trim(origin), hex(origin_pubkey)
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
list.label: origin_pubkey
list.name: origin_pubkey
list.query:
SELECT 
    concat(
        trim(origin), ' (', left(hex(origin_pubkey), 6), '...', right(hex(origin_pubkey), 6), ')',
        '|',
        hex(origin_pubkey)
    ) as combined
FROM meshcore_packets 
WHERE trim(origin) != '' AND trim(origin_pubkey) != ''
  AND $__timeFilter(ingest_timestamp)
GROUP BY trim(origin), hex(origin_pubkey)
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

list.definition:
SELECT 
    concat(
        multiIf(
            payload_type = 0, 'REQ',
            payload_type = 1, 'RESPONSE', 
            payload_type = 2, 'TXT_MSG',
            payload_type = 3, 'ACK',
            payload_type = 4, 'ADVERT',
            payload_type = 5, 'GRP_TXT',
            payload_type = 6, 'GRP_DATA',
            payload_type = 7, 'ANON_REQ',
            payload_type = 8, 'PATH',
            payload_type = 9, 'TRACE',
            payload_type = 15, 'RAW_CUSTOM',
            'UNK'
        ),
        ' (',
        hex(payload_type),
        ')|',
       payload_type
    ) as combined
FROM meshcore_packets 
WHERE $__timeFilter(ingest_timestamp)
  AND payload_type IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY payload_type
ORDER BY payload_type ASC
list.label: Payload Type
list.name: payload_type
list.query:
SELECT 
    concat(
        multiIf(
            payload_type = 0, 'REQ',
            payload_type = 1, 'RESPONSE', 
            payload_type = 2, 'TXT_MSG',
            payload_type = 3, 'ACK',
            payload_type = 4, 'ADVERT',
            payload_type = 5, 'GRP_TXT',
            payload_type = 6, 'GRP_DATA',
            payload_type = 7, 'ANON_REQ',
            payload_type = 8, 'PATH',
            payload_type = 9, 'TRACE',
            payload_type = 15, 'RAW_CUSTOM',
            'UNK'
        ),
        ' (',
        hex(payload_type),
        ')|',
       payload_type
    ) as combined
FROM meshcore_packets 
WHERE $__timeFilter(ingest_timestamp)
  AND payload_type IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY payload_type
ORDER BY payload_type ASC
